title: Joining Tencent Hunyuan 3D as a Qingyun Plan (青云计划) Intern
description: Excited to join Tencent Hunyuan 3D team as a research intern through the Tencent Qingyun Plan (青云计划), working on 3D generation and reconstruction.

title: Joining HKUST as a PhD student in Computer Science
description: Will join The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology as a PhD student in AMC and World Mind Lab under the supervision of Professor Fangneng Zhan and Professor Hongbo Fu.

title: Received HKUST Postgraduate Studentship
description: Awarded the HKUST Postgraduate Studentship upon joining the PhD program.

title: Two papers accepted to CVPR 2026
description: MonoVLM and VLM-3R were accepted to CVPR 2026, covering monocular 3D visual grounding and instruction-aligned 3D reconstruction.

title: KeyTAR accepted to IEEE S&P 2026
description: KeyTAR studies practical keystroke timing attacks and input reconstruction.

title: Received the NeurIPS 2025 Scholar Award
description: Honored with the NeurIPS 2025 Scholar Award.

title: Two papers accepted to NeurIPS 2025
description: BetaConform and Multi-Agent Debate for LLM Judges were accepted to NeurIPS 2025.

title: Bit-Flip Error Resilience accepted to EMNLP 2025
description: Bit-Flip Error Resilience in LLMs proposes a comprehensive analysis and defense framework.

title: RTGSSLAM accepted to MICRO 2025
description: RTGSSLAM proposes an edge GPU plug-in for real-time 3D Gaussian Splatting-based SLAM systems.

title: HoloZip accepted to ICCP 2025
description: HoloZip studies high-efficiency hologram compression via latent-of-latent coding.

title: UQ-Merge accepted to ACL 2025 Findings
description: UQ-Merge studies uncertainty-guided multimodal large language model merging.

title: LucidAtlas accepted to TMLR
description: LucidAtlas studies learning uncertainty-aware, covariate-disentangled, individualized atlas representations.

title: Graduated from UNC Chapel Hill with M.S. in Computer Science
description: Received M.S. in Computer Science from the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill.

title: Started M.S. in Computer Science at UNC Chapel Hill
description: Joined the University of North Carolina at Chapel Hill as an M.S. student in Computer Science.

title: Graduated from USTC with B.E. in Computer Science
description: Received B.E. in Computer Science from the University of Science and Technology of China.

title: Omni-Recon presented as an ECCV 2024 Oral
description: Omni-Recon advocated a pretrain-bake-finetune paradigm towards foundation neural radiance fields.

title: GPU Occupancy Prediction accepted to Cluster 2023
description: GPU Occupancy Prediction studies deep learning model performance prediction using graph neural networks.
